```{r}
source("config.R")
library(dplyr); library(ggplot2); library(pROC)
```

# Module eigengenes and HER2 status
```{r}
load(file.path(INTERMEDIATE, "WGCNA_v5_workspace.RData"))
meta_full <- read.delim(file.path(DIR_QC, "DEA_samples_QCmetrics.tsv"))
her2_raw  <- as.character(meta_full$her2[match(rownames(mergedMEs), meta_full$sample_id)])
her2_bin  <- dplyr::case_when(her2_raw == "0" ~ "HER2-negative",
                              her2_raw == "1" ~ "HER2-positive",
                              TRUE ~ NA_character_)
her2_bin  <- factor(her2_bin, levels = c("HER2-negative", "HER2-positive"))
```

# Module eigengene vs HER2: boxplots (Wilcoxon) and ROC / AUC
```{r}
roc_list <- list(); box_df <- list()
for (mod in c("darkorange", "violet")) {
  df <- data.frame(module = mod, ME = mergedMEs[[paste0("ME", mod)]], HER2 = her2_bin) %>%
        filter(!is.na(HER2))
  w  <- wilcox.test(ME ~ HER2, data = df)
  cat(sprintf("%s: Wilcoxon p = %.3g\n", mod, w$p.value))
  box_df[[mod]]  <- df
  roc_list[[mod]] <- roc(df$HER2, df$ME,
                         levels = c("HER2-negative", "HER2-positive"), direction = "<")
  cat(sprintf("%s: AUC = %.3f (95%% CI %.3f-%.3f)\n", mod,
              auc(roc_list[[mod]]), ci.auc(roc_list[[mod]])[1], ci.auc(roc_list[[mod]])[3]))
}

p_box <- ggplot(bind_rows(box_df), aes(HER2, ME, fill = HER2)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, outlier.size = 0.8) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ module, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("HER2-negative" = "grey70", "HER2-positive" = "#C00000")) +
  labs(x = NULL) + theme_bw() + theme(legend.position = "none")
ggsave(file.path(DIR_FIG, "Fig3.5a_HER2_boxplots.png"), p_box,
       width = 180, height = 100, units = "mm", dpi = 300)

p_roc <- ggroc(roc_list, size = 1) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(darkorange = "#E69F00", violet = "#9400D3"), name = "Module",
                      labels = sprintf("%s (AUC %.2f)", names(roc_list), sapply(roc_list, auc))) +
  labs(title = "HER2 discrimination by module eigengene") + theme_bw()
ggsave(file.path(DIR_FIG, "Fig3.5b_HER2_ROC.png"), p_roc,
       width = 150, height = 120, units = "mm", dpi = 300)
```
